prompt:
We have these requirements for our Order-to-Cash process and need a fit-gap analysis:
1. Sales reps need to put orders on hold with a reason code.
2. Volume discounts — orders over 100 units of the same item get 10% off automatically.
3. Every invoice needs to be emailed to a secondary billing contact, not just the primary.
4. Sales commissions calculated weekly and posted as a journal entry.

We're on NetSuite OneWorld with Advanced Financials. Can you do a fit-gap analysis for these?

assertions.description: Output contains all four requirement IDs (FR-O2C-01 through FR-O2C-04)
Every requirement row has an explicit fit classification (Standard, Configuration, Customization, or Out-of-Scope — or S/C/X/O shorthand)
Every requirement row has both an effort estimate and a risk level
Commission calculation (FR-O2C-04) is classified as Customization/Custom — not Standard or Config, since weekly JE posting from a calculation requires SuiteScript
Output includes a summary or count-by-category section at the end
Each requirement has a Solution ID assigned (e.g. SDD reference, CUST-xx, or similar)
